ops.text: golangci-lint's build cache cross-contaminates between on-disk clones of the same module path: `task lint` in /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-context reported 12 gosec/contextcheck issues whose paths resolved to /Users/yasyf/conductor/workspaces/cc-context/chengdu/... (a stale conductor workspace; there's also a stray symlink ~/conductor/workspaces/cc-context/fix-release-zig -> .../chengdu). None were real findings in this clone — `golangci-lint cache clean && task lint` came back 0 issues. Cost a P2 implementation lane real diagnosis time; will keep biting anyone linting from this machine until the stale workspace/symlink is removed or the cache keyed per-clone.
